hero.title: Where Dutch Education Meets African Spirit
hero.subtitle: Nurturing global citizens through bilingual education in the heart of Nairobi since 1971

about.title: About Dutch School Nairobi
about.subtitle: Nearly 50 years of educational excellence
about.description: The Netherlands School Society has been offering Dutch pre- and primary education in Nairobi for almost 50 years. Our small classrooms focus on individual learning needs, while our large, green compound provides a wonderful place to learn and discover.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional bilingual education that combines the best of Dutch educational traditions with international perspectives, preparing children to thrive in a global society.
about.visionText: A community where every child develops their unique potential through personalized learning, cultural awareness, and a deep connection to both Dutch heritage and their international environment.

features.title: Why Choose Dutch School?
features.subtitle: A unique educational experience in Nairobi

bilingual.title: Bilingual Education
bilingual.description: Full Dutch and English curriculum ensuring seamless transition to both Dutch and international school systems worldwide.

curriculum.title: IPC Curriculum
curriculum.description: International Primary Curriculum with thematic learning that encourages participation and global citizenship.

community.title: Small Community
community.description: With 15+ nationalities and small class sizes, every child receives personalized attention and care.

environment.title: Green Campus
environment.description: Large outdoor spaces and gardens provide the perfect environment for learning, play, and discovery.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Education for every stage of development

toddler.title: Toddler Group
toddler.description: A nurturing introduction to learning through play, social interaction, and early Dutch language exposure.

primary.title: Primary School
primary.description: Comprehensive bilingual education combining Dutch curriculum with International Primary Curriculum (IPC).

ntc.title: NTC Lessons
ntc.description: Dutch language and culture education for children attending other international schools in Nairobi.

adult.title: Adult Dutch Lessons
adult.description: Dutch language courses for parents and adults wanting to learn or improve their Dutch.

testimonial1.quote: The Dutch School has been a second home for our children. The bilingual approach has given them confidence in both Dutch and English, and the small class sizes mean they truly thrive.
testimonial1.author: Maria van der Berg

testimonial2.quote: Moving from the Netherlands, we were worried about our children's education. The Dutch School exceeded all expectations - they've maintained their Dutch while embracing their international experience.
testimonial2.author: Peter & Anna Jansen

testimonial3.quote: The IPC curriculum combined with Dutch traditions creates a unique learning environment. Our daughter loves school and is developing into a true global citizen.
testimonial3.author: Sarah Okonkwo

cta.title: Begin Your Child's Journey
cta.subtitle: Join our diverse community of learners
cta.description: Discover how Dutch School Nairobi can provide your child with a world-class bilingual education in a nurturing environment.

footer.description: Providing Dutch and bilingual education in Nairobi since 1971. Recognized by the Dutch Education Abroad Foundation.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Dutch School Nairobi. All rights reserved.

enrollment.title: Enrollment
enrollment.subtitle: Join the Dutch School family
enrollment.intro: We welcome applications throughout the year. Our admissions process is designed to be straightforward and supportive.

step1.title: Inquiry
step1.description: Contact us to express your interest and schedule a school visit.

step2.title: School Tour
step2.description: Visit our campus, meet our teachers, and see our facilities firsthand.

step3.title: Application
step3.description: Complete the application form and submit required documents.

step4.title: Assessment
step4.description: A friendly assessment to understand your child's needs and learning style.

step5.title: Enrollment
step5.description: Receive your offer and complete enrollment to join our community.

fees.title: Tuition & Fees
fees.description: Our fees are competitive and include all learning materials, lunch, and extracurricular activities. Contact us for detailed fee structure.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

hero.title: About Dutch School Nairobi
hero.subtitle: Nearly 50 years of nurturing young minds in Kenya

history.title: Our History
history.content: Founded in 1971, the Netherlands School Society has been a cornerstone of Dutch education in East Africa. What started as a small initiative by Dutch expatriate families has grown into a thriving international community, proudly recognized by the Dutch Education Abroad Foundation.

timeline.1971: School founded by Dutch expatriate families

approach.title: Our Educational Approach
approach.content: We believe in the power of bilingual education. Our unique combination of the Dutch curriculum and the International Primary Curriculum (IPC) ensures students are well-prepared for both Dutch and international educational pathways. Small class sizes allow for personalized attention, ensuring every child reaches their full potential.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Dedicated educators passionate about your child's success

value1.title: Excellence
value1.description: We strive for the highest standards in education and personal development.

value2.title: Community
value2.description: We foster a warm, inclusive environment where everyone belongs.

value3.title: Innovation
value3.description: We embrace new teaching methods while honoring educational traditions.

value4.title: Global Citizenship
value4.description: We prepare children to thrive in an interconnected world.
